goal: Supabase/Postgres-backed multi-organization Orun SaaS control plane
notes: Task 0083 PR #129 merged at 2026-05-29T12:30:01Z as squash commit 927c5179. PR-CI and post-merge main-CI both 9/9 SUCCESS. Code-level changes landed: cloudflare_pages_domain.console replaced with cloudflare_workers_domain.console (v4 provider, ~> 4.52 pin), apps/web-console deleted, api-edge CORS narrowed (removed *.pages.dev origins), specs updated for new deployment shape, intent.yaml stage.promotion.dependsOn=[dev] removed, orun toolchain bumped v2.3.0->v2.9.0.

Verifier result: FAIL on post-merge soak despite green CI. Root cause: CONSOLE_CUSTOM_DOMAIN env var from intent.yaml is not threaded to Terraform as TF_VAR_CONSOLE_CUSTOM_DOMAIN in the cloudflare-domain component apply step. Both stage and prod cloudflare-domain apply jobs ran with empty value: '0 added, 0 changed, 0 destroyed'. cloudflare_workers_domain.console count=0 -> resource never created. stage.sourceplane.ai and prod.sourceplane.ai resolve to NXDOMAIN. Same class of bug as Task 0082.2.

Rollback hatch healthy: both sourceplane-web-console-next-{stage,prod}.rahulvarghesepullely.workers.dev return HTTP 200 with 'Sourceplane Console'. Users on workers.dev URLs unaffected; only consumers expecting apex hostnames are broken.

Task 0083.1 hotfix scope: wire CONSOLE_CUSTOM_DOMAIN -> TF_VAR_CONSOLE_CUSTOM_DOMAIN in infra/terraform/cloudflare-domain/component.yaml. Reference the cloudflare-hyperdrive component for the working env-mapping pattern. Acceptance criteria: post-apply curl on both stage and prod apex hostnames returns 200 with body 'Sourceplane Console'.

repo_health set to yellow until Task 0083.1 lands and apex probes pass. Verifier report at ai/reports/task-0083-verifier.md (overwritten, not appended). Implementer-side observation logged: future infra-deploy tasks should require real curl evidence (not just plan output) committed before scoping a verifier.
